Let $a_n$ be sequence of positive numbers ($n = 1, 2, \dots$, $a_n \ne 0$ for
all $n$), and let $b_n = (a_1 + \dots + a_n)/n$, the average of the first $n$
numbers of the sequence. Suppose $\displaystyle{\sum_{n=1}^{\infty}
\frac{1}{a_n}}$ is a convergent series. Prove that
$\displaystyle{\sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{1}{b_n}}$ is also a convergent series.
